since_last: 31% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.89%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.82% · Gold -0.69% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 31% of 85 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.89%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.89%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.86%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +9.55%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +9.55%, VRT +8.36%, MRVL +7.12%, AMAT +7.05%, SMR +6.47%. Laggards: SPCX -7.62%, SNAP -7.17%, APP -5.64%, AI -4.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.62% at $195.28
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.62% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
